claims.summary: Dynamic noise should change smoothly across gradient and pressure rather than cliff at a threshold.
claims.disposition: Verified smoothstep gradient/pressure room and bounded dynamic-noise tests.

claims.summary: Viscous rho near its high-entropy threshold needs continuity and an explicit ceiling.
claims.disposition: Verified viscous-rho ceiling and exact threshold-edge no-jump regression.

claims.summary: A four-tick noise spike at a steep gradient should be compared against baseline.
claims.disposition: Routed an offline deterministic replay using the existing dynamic-noise review.

claims.summary: Adaptive geometry, leak, or live dynamic-noise activation could respond to clumping.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because these changes alter live ESN dynamics.
